_comment: Config for the Exodus -> Notion cost reconciler. Secrets (Notion token, optional Etherscan/CoinGecko keys) come from environment variables / GitHub secrets, never this file. Safe to edit and commit.
_comment_source: 'ethereum' = fully automated on-chain watcher (no CSV). 'csv' = read Exodus exports from data/exodus/.

ethereum._comment: Watches outgoing USDT (ERC-20) transfers FROM 'address'. Keyless via Blockscout by default; set the ETHERSCAN_API_KEY GitHub secret to use Etherscan instead (more reliable, free key).

reconcile._comment_start_date: Only check payments on/after this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Set to the day you switched to the on-chain watcher so old history isn't re-flagged. Set null to check everything.
reconcile._comment_min: Payments worth less than this in USD are ignored (dust).

matching._comment_mode: 'txref' = a payment is tracked ONLY if its transaction reference (shown in each alert) appears in a Total Costs row's Notes. Reliable even when many costs share the same amount. 'fuzzy' = match by amount+date (unreliable with clustered amounts).
matching._comment: In 'fuzzy' mode: a payment is 'tracked' if a Total Costs row within date_window_days is within EITHER amount_rel_tolerance OR amount_abs_tolerance_usd. In 'txref' mode these tolerances are only used to flag an Amount Mismatch on an already-linked payment.

period_check._comment: Per month, if total USD that left exceeds total logged by more than BOTH thresholds, raise a Period Gap alert.
